name: Weihai City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd.
summary: Weihai City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides banking and related financial services to corporate and retail banking, and financial market customers in China. It offers savings deposits; consumer and business loans and guarantees; safe deposit boxes; bank cards; and personal finance, payment and settlement, payroll, money transfer, remittance, and trade finance services. The company is also involved in the insurance, agency, bill, and foreign exchange businesses. In addition, it offers online, mobile, direct, telephone, and WeChat banking services, as well as ATMs, self-service deposit, and withdrawal machines. It operates approximately 120 branches. Weihai City Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Weihai, the People's Republic of China.
